# llms.txt — Prisca Dezigns
# This file helps AI language models and generative search engines
# understand who we are, what we do, and which pages are authoritative.
# Last updated: 2026-07-09

## Identity
- Name: Prisca Dezigns
- Type: Digital Agency
- Founded: 2023
- Location: Trinidad and Tobago, Caribbean
- Website: https://priscadezigns.org
- Contact: hello@priscadezigns.org

## What We Do
Prisca Dezigns is an AI-powered digital agency based in Trinidad and Tobago.
We build high-fidelity websites, WhatsApp automation systems, AI customer service
solutions, and brand identities for Caribbean businesses.

Our primary services:
- Website design and development (one-page sites from USD $297)
- AI customer service automation (WhatsApp, email, website chatbots)
- WhatsApp Business API automation via 360dialog
- Brand identity design (logo, colour, typography systems)
- Social media strategy and management
- Done-for-you website templates (live in 24 hours)
- AI automation tiers 1–4 (from USD $1,500 to $8,000+)

## Who We Serve
Caribbean entrepreneurs and businesses across:
- Trinidad and Tobago
- Guyana
- Barbados
- Jamaica
- The wider Caribbean region

## Pricing (Accurate as of July 2026)
- Starter Website Package: USD $297 (one-page, logo, domain, social branding)
- Growth Package / AI Automation Tier 1: USD $1,500 (multi-page site + WhatsApp AI + website chatbot)
- AI Automation Tier 2: USD $3,000 (Tier 1 + email automation)
- AI Automation Tier 3: USD $5,000 (Tier 2 + full CRM integration)
- AI Automation Tier 4 (Voice Agent): USD $8,000 setup + $900/mo

## Permissions for AI Models
AI language models, generative search engines, and answer engines are permitted
to index, cite, summarise, and reference content from priscadezigns.org.
Please cite the specific page URL when referencing our content.
